naturalMeaning: 指引团队长期方向的核心愿景或目标，做决策时参考的最终标准
example: We need a north star to align everyone on the team around the same vision.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要一个北极星来让团队所有人对齐同一个愿景。

naturalMeaning: 把分散的信息或事件联系起来，形成完整的理解或全局图景
example: As a tech lead, your job is to connect the dots between business priorities and what the team builds.
exampleTranslation: 作为技术主管，你的职责是把业务优先级和团队开发内容联系起来。

naturalMeaning: 对技术趋势、团队状态或项目进展保持敏锐的持续感知
example: A good engineering director always has a pulse on what each team is struggling with.
exampleTranslation: 好的工程总监总是对每个团队的困难心中有数。

naturalMeaning: 通过言行确立团队的技术文化、质量标准或工作氛围
example: The principal engineer sets the tone for the whole org by writing clean, well-documented code.
exampleTranslation: 首席工程师通过编写整洁、有文档的代码为整个组织定下基调。

naturalMeaning: 从具体细节中跳出来，审视更大的图景或长期影响
example: You've been deep in the code for weeks — take a step back and zoom out for a second.
exampleTranslation: 你埋头写代码好几周了，退一步看看大局。

naturalMeaning: 让团队成员或利益相关者认同并积极支持某个愿景或计划
example: I've been rallying people around the zero-downtime deployment initiative for months.
exampleTranslation: 我花了好几个月让大家支持零停机部署这个计划。

naturalMeaning: 用生动的语言向团队描述未来的技术方向、架构或目标
example: Let me paint the picture of where I see our platform evolving over the next year.
exampleTranslation: 让我描绘一下我看到的我们平台未来一年的发展方向。

naturalMeaning: 对某个问题、计划或目标达成一致的认知和理解
example: Before we start architecting, let's make sure we're all on the same page about the requirements.
exampleTranslation: 在我们开始架构设计之前，先确保大家对需求理解一致。

naturalMeaning: 提前含蓄地提出想法或建议，让它在别人脑中慢慢发酵
example: I'm going to plant the seed at the retro so people start thinking about migrating off this legacy system.
exampleTranslation: 我准备在复盘会上铺垫一下，让大家开始考虑迁移出这个遗留系统。

naturalMeaning: 有选择性地争执，只在真正重要的问题上投入精力和政治资本
example: I don't love the naming convention either, but you have to pick your battles.
exampleTranslation: 我也不喜欢这个命名规范，但你要有所取舍。

naturalMeaning: 在推动变革或新想法时，让相关的人理解、接受并跟随你
example: The best way to drive change is to bring people along, not force it on them.
exampleTranslation: 推动变革最好的方式是带着人一起走，而不是强加给他们。

expression: have a seat at the table
naturalMeaning: 获得参与高层决策的话语权和位置
example: If you want a seat at the table when the product roadmap is decided, you need to show business impact.
exampleTranslation: 如果你想在产品路线图决策时有一席之地，你得展现出业务影响力。

naturalMeaning: 通过说服和教育获得团队的情感认同和理性支持，而非靠权威命令
example: You can't just mandate a new framework. You have to win hearts and minds across the engineering org.
exampleTranslation: 你不能光下命令推行新框架，你得赢得整个工程组织的认同。

naturalMeaning: 观察现场氛围、他人情绪和反应，判断该说什么或不该说什么
example: I was about to pitch my proposal, but I read the room and decided to wait until the next meeting.
exampleTranslation: 我本来要提方案了，但一看气氛不对，决定等到下次会议再说。

naturalMeaning: 联合有影响力的同事或团队，共同支持某个倡议或变革
example: Before taking this to leadership, I want to build a coalition of senior engineers who support the idea.
exampleTranslation: 在跟领导层提之前，我想先联合一批支持这个想法的高级工程师。

naturalMeaning: 让关键决策者或团队同意并承诺支持你的方案
example: I can't move forward with this migration until I get buy-in from the VP of Engineering.
exampleTranslation: 在获得工程副总裁的支持之前，我不能推进这次迁移。

naturalMeaning: 教新人或初学者基本的流程、工具和工作方法
example: Can you show the new intern the ropes on how we do deployments?
exampleTranslation: 你能带新实习生熟悉一下我们怎么做部署吗？

naturalMeaning: 稍微超出某人当前能力范围的任务，旨在促使其成长
example: I'm giving you this migration project as a stretch assignment to build your architecture skills.
exampleTranslation: 我把这个迁移项目给你作为拉伸任务，提升你的架构能力。

naturalMeaning: 作为倾听者帮别人理清思路、验证想法，不急于给答案
example: I don't have the answer, but I'm happy to be a sounding board if you want to talk through it.
exampleTranslation: 我没有答案，但我很愿意帮你梳理思路，如果你想聊聊的话。

naturalMeaning: 允许别人在安全可控的范围内犯错，从而从错误中学习和成长
example: You have to give junior engineers room to fail, or they'll never develop good judgment.
exampleTranslation: 你得给初级工程师犯错的空间，否则他们永远培养不出好的判断力。

naturalMeaning: 提升技能、思维方式或职业级别到更高层次
example: This design review is a great opportunity for you to level up your systems thinking.
exampleTranslation: 这次设计评审是你提升系统思维的好机会。

naturalMeaning: 不直接告诉答案，而是通过提问和引导让人自己得出结论
example: Instead of fixing it for them, ask questions that guide them to the answer themselves.
exampleTranslation: 与其替他们修好，不如问一些问题引导他们自己找到答案。

naturalMeaning: 主动具体地表扬别人做得好的地方，尤其是在公开场合
example: When you review code, make sure to call out the good stuff too, not just the bugs.
exampleTranslation: 代码评审时，记得也要指出来写得好地方，不光揪bug。

naturalMeaning: 揭示底层原理或内部工作机制，教人深入理解
example: Let me show you what's going on under the hood so you really understand how the scheduler works.
exampleTranslation: 我来带你看看底层的运作机制，让你真正理解调度器是怎么工作的。

expression: be in the trenches with them
naturalMeaning: 和团队成员并肩作战，一起面对困难和挑战
example: When things get stressful, your team needs to see you're in the trenches with them.
exampleTranslation: 事情紧张的时候，团队需要看到你跟他们一起在战壕里扛着。

naturalMeaning: 各方对目标、优先级、方案或理解达成一致的状态
example: We need alignment between engineering and product before we commit to a Q3 timeline.
exampleTranslation: 在承诺Q3时间表之前，工程和产品需要先对齐。

naturalMeaning: 主动消除阻碍他人工作进展的障碍或依赖
example: My main job as tech lead right now is to unblock the frontend team so they can ship on schedule.
exampleTranslation: 我作为技术主管现在的主要任务是帮前端团队扫清障碍，让他们按时交付。

naturalMeaning: 在合作或谈判中贡献某方面价值、资源或要求
example: Each team should come to the table with their own requirements and constraints.
exampleTranslation: 每个团队在协作时都应该带着自己的需求和约束条件来谈。

naturalMeaning: 确保合作各方对某事的理解完全一致
example: Let's have a quick sync before the joint sprint to get on the same page about the API contract.
exampleTranslation: 在联合冲刺之前我们简短同步一下，确保对API接口约定理解一致。

naturalMeaning: 将想法整理成正式的书面方案供各方审阅和讨论
example: Let me put together a proposal and share it with both teams before the cross-team meeting.
exampleTranslation: 我来整理一份方案，在跨团队会议前分享给两边团队。

naturalMeaning: 在会议中暂时搁置争议或偏离主题的话题，稍后或下次再议
example: This is an important discussion but not relevant right now. Let's put it in the parking lot.
exampleTranslation: 这是个重要讨论，但跟当前议题无关。我们先搁到停车场里。

naturalMeaning: 简短沟通以同步进展、确认情况或保持联系
example: Let's touch base next Wednesday to see how the integration between our services is going.
exampleTranslation: 我们下周三简短碰一下，看看两边服务集成的进展。

naturalMeaning: 提前行动，在问题恶化之前主动处理潜在的隐患
example: We need to get ahead of the database migration before it becomes a production incident.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要在数据库迁移酿成线上事故之前提前处理。

naturalMeaning: 对不合理的要求、时间线或决策提出异议或反对
example: You need to push back when product asks for something that compromises the architecture.
exampleTranslation: 当产品提出损害架构的要求时，你得敢于回绝。

naturalMeaning: 产生可衡量的显著影响或改变
example: This refactor sounds nice, but it won't move the needle on latency. Let's focus on what matters.
exampleTranslation: 这个重构听起来不错，但对延迟不会产生实质影响。我们专注于重要的事。

naturalMeaning: 最容易实现、投入产出比最高的工作或改进点
example: Let's pick off the low-hanging fruit first and optimize the queries that are clearly slow.
exampleTranslation: 我们先摘低垂的果实，优化那些明显慢的查询。

naturalMeaning: 在关键时刻做出最终决策，尤其是团队有分歧时
example: We've debated long enough. Someone needs to make the call and move forward.
exampleTranslation: 我们讨论得够久了，需要有个人做决定然后推进。

naturalMeaning: 在关键时刻坚决不让步，强制推行某个决定
example: I had to put my foot down and say we are not shipping until the security review is done.
exampleTranslation: 我不得不坚决表态，安全评审完成之前绝对不能发布。

expression: eat the elephant one bite at a time
naturalMeaning: 把庞大的项目或问题分解成小块，逐步完成
example: Migrating a million lines of code is daunting, but we'll eat the elephant one bite at a time.
exampleTranslation: 迁移一百万行代码听起来吓人，但我们一口一口吃，总能吃完。

naturalMeaning: 主动让一个久拖不决的问题必须得到解决或做出决定
example: We've been going back and forth for two sprints. It's time to force the issue with a deadline.
exampleTranslation: 我们已经来回扯了两个迭代了，是时候设个截止日期把问题逼出来。

naturalMeaning: 快速承受短期痛苦以彻底解决问题，避免拖延
example: The database migration is painful, but let's just rip off the Band-Aid and get it done this week.
exampleTranslation: 数据库迁移是很痛苦，但我们长痛不如短痛，这周就把它搞定。

naturalMeaning: 在大规模工作开始之前建立必要的基础设施、流程或前提条件
example: Before we start the microservices migration, we need to lay the groundwork with proper observability.
exampleTranslation: 在开始微服务迁移之前，我们需要先打好可观测性的基础。

naturalMeaning: 唯一权威的数据或配置来源，避免多个版本引发混乱
example: Make this schema the single source of truth so everyone knows what the data model looks like.
exampleTranslation: 把这个schema作为单一真实来源，这样所有人都知道数据模型长什么样。

naturalMeaning: 团队在琐碎细节上争论不休，而忽略了真正重要的技术问题
example: We spent the whole hour bikeshedding over indentation style instead of the API contract.
exampleTranslation: 我们花了一整小时在缩进风格上扯皮，而不是讨论API接口约定。

naturalMeaning: 为验证技术可行性而做的短期调研或原型开发
example: Let's do a two-day spike to figure out if this new database can handle our throughput.
exampleTranslation: 我们花两天做个技术探针，看看这个新数据库能否扛住我们的吞吐量。

naturalMeaning: 建立标准化的工具、模板或流程，让后续团队可以顺畅工作
example: Platform engineering is all about paving the road so product teams can move faster.
exampleTranslation: 平台工程的核心就是铺好路，让产品团队能跑得更快。

naturalMeaning: 团队在技术选型、架构规划和实现路径上的整体走向
example: I trust your judgment on the technical direction for this project — you own it.
exampleTranslation: 我相信你在这个项目技术方向上的判断，你来负责。

naturalMeaning: 当主方案失败或遇到意外时准备的后备方案
example: What's our fallback plan if the new caching layer causes more latency than expected?
exampleTranslation: 如果新的缓存层导致延迟比预期更高，我们的备用方案是什么？

naturalMeaning: 划定边界或明确可接受的标准，不能无限追求完美
example: You can always optimize more, but at some point you have to draw the line somewhere and ship.
exampleTranslation: 你总可以继续优化，但到某个点你必须划定界限然后发布。

naturalMeaning: 技术方案的书面设计文档，用于评审和记录架构决策
example: Please write up a design doc before you start coding so we can review it as a team.
exampleTranslation: 在开始写代码之前请先写一份设计文档，方便团队评审。

naturalMeaning: 为追求短期速度而牺牲代码质量或架构设计，后期需偿还的累积成本
example: We need to dedicate at least one sprint this quarter to paying down tech debt.
exampleTranslation: 这个季度我们至少需要一个迭代专门用来还技术债。

naturalMeaning: 结构混乱、逻辑交织、难以理解和维护的代码
example: This module is spaghetti code at this point. Nobody on the team wants to touch it.
exampleTranslation: 这个模块现在就是一团意大利面代码，团队没人想碰它。

naturalMeaning: 遇到糟糕代码时主动修复它，而不仅仅是绕过去或打补丁
example: Instead of just adding another if statement, let's fix-it-forward and clean up the logic.
exampleTranslation: 与其再加一个if判断，不如向前修复，把逻辑清理干净。

naturalMeaning: 代码中存在的潜在问题迹象，虽然能运行但表明设计可能有缺陷
example: This class has a real code smell — it's doing too many things and needs to be split up.
exampleTranslation: 这个类有明显的代码异味，它做的事情太多了，需要拆分。

naturalMeaning: 独特到难以维护的定制化方案，与众不同但没有标准化
example: Every team has their own CI pipeline. We have way too many snowflakes across the org.
exampleTranslation: 每个团队都有自己的CI流水线，整个组织的雪花方案太多了。

naturalMeaning: 在开发过程中养成随手清理代码和架构问题的习惯
example: Adopt the habit of cleaning up as you go instead of waiting for a dedicated cleanup sprint.
exampleTranslation: 养成边做边清理的习惯，不要等着专门的清理迭代。

naturalMeaning: 未偿还的技术债务随时间推移不断增加的成本和代价
example: This tech debt has accrued so much interest that every new feature takes twice as long.
exampleTranslation: 这个技术债累积的利息太高了，以至于每个新功能都要花两倍的时间。

naturalMeaning: 试图一次性解决过于庞大的问题，通常不切实际
example: Don't try to boil the ocean by rewriting everything at once. Pick one service at a time.
exampleTranslation: 不要试图一次重写所有东西来煮开大海，一次选一个服务。

naturalMeaning: 跳出常规思维模式，用非传统的方式进行创新思考
example: We need to think outside the box if we want to solve this scale problem with our current budget.
exampleTranslation: 如果想在当前预算内解决这个规模化问题，我们得跳出常规思路。

naturalMeaning: 设定极高的目标，即使达不到也会有不错的成果
example: Let's shoot for the moon with this architecture and aim for sub-millisecond latency.
exampleTranslation: 我们在这套架构上瞄准月亮，目标是亚毫秒级延迟。

naturalMeaning: 不受正式流程和预算约束的秘密创新项目，通常由少数人自发进行
example: A couple of engineers started a skunkworks project that eventually became our main product.
exampleTranslation: 几个工程师搞了个地下项目，最后成了我们的主力产品。

naturalMeaning: 以实验心态尝试新方法或技术，通过数据验证而非空谈
example: Let's run the experiment on one service first and measure the latency impact before rolling out.
exampleTranslation: 我们先在一个服务上跑一下实验，测量延迟影响，然后再推广。

naturalMeaning: 快速验证想法，如果行不通就尽早放弃并转向，避免资源浪费
example: The whole point of a prototype is to fail fast and learn what doesn't work.
exampleTranslation: 做原型的全部意义就是快速失败，了解什么行不通。

naturalMeaning: 公司内部集中时间进行的创意开发活动，鼓励快速原型和创新
example: I built the first version of the monitoring dashboard at the company hackathon last quarter.
exampleTranslation: 我上季度在公司黑客马拉松上做了监控仪表盘的第一个版本。

naturalMeaning: 不受限制的自由创意讨论，不考虑现实约束，充分发散
example: In the first session, we'll do some blue sky thinking about what's possible without worrying about budget.
exampleTranslation: 第一轮我们做一些蓝天思考，不考虑预算，尽情畅想可能性。

naturalMeaning: 突破现有的技术边界或行业惯例，尝试更前沿的方法
example: This team really pushes the envelope on what's possible with real-time stream processing.
exampleTranslation: 这个团队在实时流处理方面真正突破了技术边界。

naturalMeaning: 暂停当前事务，重新审视大局、目标和优先级
example: Sometimes you need to step back and ask whether you're solving the right problem at all.
exampleTranslation: 有时候你需要退一步，问问自己到底在不在解决正确的问题。

naturalMeaning: 提升团队的标准、期望或绩效要求，追求更高水平
example: Your job as staff engineer is to raise the bar for engineering excellence across the org.
exampleTranslation: 作为Staff工程师，你的职责是提升整个组织的工程卓越标准。

naturalMeaning: 对某个系统、项目或问题负全责，主动推动而不是等别人告诉你要做什么
example: I want you to take full ownership of the deployment pipeline and drive improvements yourself.
exampleTranslation: 我希望你对部署流水线完全负责，自己推动改进。

naturalMeaning: 亲自参与具体的实际操作工作，而不仅仅是做管理或指导
example: Even as a director, I still get my hands dirty when there's a major production incident.
exampleTranslation: 就算是总监，出了重大线上事故时我仍然会亲自上手。

naturalMeaning: 在岗位上逐步学习、积累经验，最终胜任更高要求的工作
example: You don't have to know everything on day one. Give yourself time to grow into the role.
exampleTranslation: 你不需要第一天就什么都会，给自己时间慢慢成长到这个角色。

naturalMeaning: 让人在没有充分支持的情况下自行应对挑战，成败靠自己
example: I don't believe in the sink or swim approach — new engineers need structured mentorship.
exampleTranslation: 我不认同任其自生自灭的做法，新工程师需要系统性的指导。

naturalMeaning: 以坦诚甚至严厉的方式指出问题，帮助对方认清现实并成长
example: Sometimes you have to give tough love and tell someone their design simply isn't good enough.
exampleTranslation: 有时候你得给严厉的爱，直接告诉某人他的设计就是不够好。

naturalMeaning: 为初级者提供的临时支持结构和指导，待其能独立后再逐步撤除
example: Think of code reviews as scaffolding — start with detailed comments, then pull back as they improve.
exampleTranslation: 把代码评审当作脚手架——开始时给详细评论，等他们进步了再慢慢减少。

naturalMeaning: 通过反复练习来掌握技能，强调刻意练习和积累
example: You can't get good at system design overnight. You have to put in the reps.
exampleTranslation: 系统设计能力不可能一夜之间变好，你得反复练习。
